channel.title: Pleaserobme on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Pleaserobme on adoption curve dot net

item.title: Robbery for fun and profit
item.description: Another day, another Daily Mail-esque panic about how social networking is causing the downfall of modern society as we know it. This time it’s pleaserobme.com, a site that scrapes location-based services such as Foursquare and Gowalla and publicises the fact that you’re - shock, horror - not at home. It’s a clever idea, but it does of course rely on a certain amount of coding skill to be able to set it up in the first place.
